visual: Steps diagonally into a bow stance with one hand guarding above the forehead palm-out and the other pushing forward at chest height, repeated to alternating corners.
motion_description: Starting with arms crossed at the chest, the practitioner steps diagonally forward with the right foot into a bow stance while rotating the torso to face the right side. In a continuous, deliberate flow, the right arm sweeps down and then up, concluding in a guarding position above the forehead with the palm facing outward. Concurrently, the left hand pushes forward from chest level to extend outward at shoulder height.
